name: New Orleans Pralines/Microwave
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 4-5 quart microwave-safe dish, stir together the buttermilk, sugar, pecans, salt, and butter.
2. Microwave on high for 12 minutes, stirring at the 4-minute intervals.
3. Stir in the baking soda until foamy.
4. Cook on high for 1 minute. (This last step gives the pralines a caramel color.)
5. Beat the mixture until it is tacky, about 1 minute.
6. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto a sheet of foil.
